tooltip.text: Select the monitoring site you are visiting from the list.
Take a photo of the site (a photo that captures river banks, waterbody and any ongoing activities) before you start testing.
Stand at the water's edge and wait until the accuracy reaches 15 metres or less.
Stand at the water's edge and describe the colour of the surface water — choose the closest match
Lean carefully towards the water and describe any smell — do not put your face close to the water
Choose High if banks are flooded, Medium if banks are visible, or Low if the river is trickling or the riverbed is showing.
Dip the Hanna pH meter, wait for the number to stop changing, then enter the value (must be between 2 and 10).
Dip the Hanna pH meter, wait for the number to stop changing, then enter the value (must be between 2 and 10).
Dip the Hanna pH meter, wait for the number to stop changing, then enter the value (must be between 2 and 10).
Read the temperature from the Hanna DO meter after it stabilises in the water (must be between 5 and 50).
Fill 1/3 of plastic beaker distilled water, Dip the probe inside the beaker without touching the water. Wait until temperature stablizes
Dip the Hanna DO meter, stir gently, wait 1–2 minutes for the number to stop changing, then enter the value.
Dip the Hanna DO meter, stir gently, wait 1–2 minutes for the number to stop changing, then enter the value.
Dip the Hanna DO meter, stir gently, wait 1–2 minutes for the number to stop changing, then enter the value.
Tick everything you can see at or within 50 metres of the water — select None if the area looks undisturbed
Select plant species in the catchement (can be multiple)

Estimate what percentage of the water surface is covered by invasive plants like water hyacinth — enter 0 if none, 100% if completely covered and choose an interdiate percentage for partially covered water surface. Use discretion while selecting an intermediate percentage
Enter the name of the main fish species that local fishers are targeting at this site today.

question.name: fist_caught_weight
question.label: What is the total weight of the fish caught today (In Kilograms)?

tooltip.text: One crate is 35kgs, 1 basin is 15kgs and 1 gunia is 50kgs

question.name: boat_crew
question.label: How many crew did you have on the boat?

tooltip.text: Enter hours of active fishing only — do not include travel time or breaks.

question.name: percentage_of_each_fish_species_caught_today
question.label: What is the percentage of each fish species caught today
